name: Fly.io Personal API Token
description: Generates a personal access token for the Fly.io API. This token grants full access to all organisations and apps your Fly.io account can manage.

steps.title: Open the Fly.io personal access tokens page
steps.instruction: Sign in to your Fly.io account and navigate to the personal access tokens page.

steps.title: Name your new token
steps.instruction: In the 'Token name' field, enter a descriptive label so you can identify this token later, for example 'rialu-poller' or 'claude-code-deploy'.
steps.screenshot_hint: Text input labelled 'Token name' with a 'Create token' button beside or below it

steps.title: Optionally set an expiration
steps.instruction: If an expiration dropdown is shown, choose how long the token should be valid. Select 'No expiration' for long-lived automation tokens, or pick a shorter duration if you prefer to rotate regularly.

steps.title: Create the token
steps.instruction: Click the 'Create token' button. The page will display your new token value once.
steps.screenshot_hint: A green or highlighted box showing the newly created token string starting with 'FlyV1 ...'

steps.title: Copy the token
steps.instruction: Copy the displayed token immediately. It typically starts with 'FlyV1 ' followed by a long alphanumeric string.
steps.warning: Fly.io only shows the token once at creation time. If you lose it, you must revoke it and create a new one.

steps.title: Verify the token works
steps.instruction: Open a terminal and run: curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer <your-token>" https://api.fly.io/graphql -d '{"query":"{currentUser{email}}"}' — you should see your email address in the response.
steps.screenshot_hint: Terminal showing a JSON response with your email

vault_entry.notes: Personal access token for Fly.io API and CLI. Full access to all orgs.
